acceptance.criterion: The suite redirects fd 0 to devnull at discovery; `tests/test_suite_hermeticity.py` proves in-process EOF and child-inherited EOF
acceptance.evidence: AMENDED after in-run discovery: `discover -s tests` does not import the tests package, so the fd-0 guard never loaded under the gate invocation (a background runner with unix-socket stdin hung the suite at the raw os.read probe; CPU-vs-wall signature diagnosed it). Fixed at three layers: canonical invocation is now `discover -s tests -t .` (verify_repo + docs), the guard self-verifies loudly, and the probe is hang-proof (fstat assertion first; non-blocking read). Proof: test_suite_hermeticity 3/3 OK with stdin wired to a never-sending socketpair under the -t . form; full-suite re-proof under the same hostile runner recorded at B5 Close.
